subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained and won that which was inscribed in the Books of God, the Lord of all worlds, who hath gone forth from his station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر و فاز بما کان مسطورا فی کتب الله رب العالمین خرج عن مقامه
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
